strengths: 20-year career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering — exceeds the 15-year minimum with clear technical breadth
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and multiple open-source projects demonstrates a builder and product mindset
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, showing active engagement with agentic AI tooling
concerns: Titles throughout the career top out at Staff/Senior Software Engineer — well below the Director-level IC seniority this role requires
AI involvement is recent, execution-focused, and narrow (MCP generators); no evidence of AI strategy leadership, published research, or recognized external thought leadership in AI
No advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no demonstrated experience advising strategic customers, influencing product roadmaps, or shaping cloud platform direction at scale
response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled, polyglot engineer with a long hands-on career and genuine entrepreneurial instincts, but the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with demonstrated AI strategy leadership, external influence, and the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers — none of which are evidenced in this resume. The AI work is real but shallow and very recent; the seniority and strategic scope mismatch is the dominant signal here.
